title: Phase 5 — AI Research Agent
state: open
description: |
  Ship a reference research agent that uses the NanoProof SDK end-to-end.
  Demonstrates Citations-as-a-First-Class-Citizen in an agent loop.
  Built as the canonical example for the Lepton Hackathon judge demo.
due_on: 2026-09-09
---

## Acceptance

- [ ] Agent CLI (`@nanoproof/agent`) reads a topic, sources citations, settles payments via x402
- [ ] Live demo: agent answers a research question and pays 3 creators a total of $0.01 USDC
- [ ] SDK package published to npm as `@nanoproof/sdk`
- [ ] Demo video recorded and linked from README
- [ ] Architecture doc (`docs/phase-5-ai-research-agent.md`) finalized
- [ ] All four previous phases operational in production
